arts.ttl: Bruno Guimaraes' unveils plan for Sandro Tonali as Newcastle United boos become distant memory
arts.sum: Howe's team are starting to settle down now with Tonali taking the number 6 role and Bruno pushing further forward in the number 8 position. The Brazil international and Newcastle team captain said: "He went through a difficult moment in his career but he’s always been positive.

arts.ttl: Isak? Gyokeres? Rashford?: Arsenal 'expect SIGNIFICANT' transfer for striker
arts.sum: Havertz’s form to end last season, where he finished with nine goals and six assists in his final 14 appearances, had convinced Arsenal to persist with him as their leading striker but the German has just five Premier League goals this year. Alexander Isak is considered by many to be a leading candidate in Arsenal’s search for a striker, having scored 38 goals in 67 league appearances for Newcastle

arts.ttl: 'Unbelievable player': Bruno Guimaraes left blown away by 'amazing' Newcastle ace after 3-1 win over Brentford
arts.sum: Newcastle United secured their place in the semi-finals of the Carabao Cup by beating Brentford 3-1 at St. James’ Park. Sandro Tonali was the star...

arts.ttl: Newcastle United transfer state of play: Almiron exit, fresh Dubravka bid, Guehi Man City link
arts.sum: Almiron was linked with a move to River Plate earlier this year but a potential loan deal to Crystal Palace, Leicester City and Wolves have now been mooted by sources close to his agent. Newcastle United forward Miguel Almiron could be set for a switch to a Premier League rival in January.
